Put the Navisworks 2025 build of BIMCamel.dll in this folder (2025\), next to the en-US\ and
Resources\ folders.

IMPORTANT: this DLL must be built against the Navisworks 2025 API (Autodesk.Navisworks.Api v22).
A DLL built against another year still loads, but its BIMCamel ribbon tab will NOT appear.

Build it with:
    dotnet build BIMCamel\BIMCamel.csproj -c Release ^
        -p:NavisworksDir="C:\Program Files\Autodesk\Navisworks Manage 2025"
The DLL is then at:  BIMCamel\bin\Release\net48\BIMCamel.dll

Once the DLL is here, copy the whole BIMCamel.bundle folder into:
    %AppData%\Autodesk\ApplicationPlugins\

You only need the year folder(s) for the Navisworks version(s) you actually run; the others can be
left empty. You can delete this text file.
